user.title: Rain Bird IQ4
user.description: Sign in with your Rain Bird 2.0 / IQ4 account. This is not the 6 digit controller PIN.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Rain Bird IQ4.
error.invalid_auth: Rain Bird IQ4 rejected the username or password.
error.waf_challenge: Rain Bird IQ4 returned an AWS WAF browser challenge. Try again later or from a different network.

abort.already_configured: This Rain Bird IQ4 account is already configured.
